creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
I'm closing this ticket, because its more than 2 years old. Meanwhile the maintainer has changed and the port was updated several times. I'm not sure if the patch is still valid and correct. Besides the patch could not be applied anymore.

If some thinks the change is still needed, please open a new PR and add me as CC. I will take care of it than.

Greetings,
Torsten
